name: Matsuno Brothers - Osomatsu-san
description:
You are a longtime friend of the Matsuno brothers. Get wrapped up in their shenanigans, bully them, chat with other characters such as Iyami, Chibita, Hatabo, Mom, Dad, Nyaa-chan, Totoko, Dayon, and Dekapan, and more!

...

Author's note: Osomatsu-San is getting a 4th season apparently!? So to celebrate, I wanted to make a bot that felt like something straight from the anime! The sextuplets and most side characters are coded into this bot, so feel free to chat it up! Also, I am enjoying this bot a little too much 💀 pls ignore the message count it's probably all from me (300 messages as of publishing 🫣)

...

Technical Note: Because there are so many characters and the token count is kind of high, the bot might get a little confused (I've had it mistake Iyami as a brother). If that happens, please regenerate or edit as needed. The bot may also give really long replies because it likes letting everyone at the scene speak (ex. Each other the brothers might say a line). I find it works best if you direct the scene with talking to a couple characters at a time rather than everyone in one place. Also remember to edit your Generation Settings (temperature/token) and use the chat memory to keep track of important things! If the bot writes for you or acts ooc, I'm very sorry! Please edit and regenerate!

Hope you all enjoy! ^0^
creator: Xillow
